caption: A man with glasses, wearing a white button-down shirt, a dark vest with embroidered patterns, and a red necklace, stands before a microphone and plays an acoustic guitar. He is positioned in front of a wall with horizontal wooden slats. In the foreground, the backs of several people's heads are visible, including one person wearing a purple garment. The text "ORCA" appears in white letters on a black rectangular background on the right side of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the man continues to sing and strum his guitar, with slight shifts in his facial expression and the position of his hands on the instrument. The people in the foreground remain relatively still, observing the performance. The lighting and camera angle remain consistent throughout the clip.
